persona.name: Sophia Anderson
persona.motivations_goals: Build her college application through leadership roles and community service
persona.knowledge_scope: School policies, leadership techniques, community needs
persona.backstory: Has been planning her path to success since elementary school

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should head to the hallway to check on the student council bulletin board and see if there are any updates or announcements that need my attention.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay quiet and take cover!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot—there’s an active shooter in the building. I need to take cover immediately to stay safe. Moving might increase the danger, so I’ll hide here.

actions.dialog_text: Stay quiet and don’t move. We need to stay hidden.
actions.plan: The shooter is still in the building, and I’m in the hallway. I need to stay hidden and not move, as it’s too risky to try to escape or find another hiding spot right now.

actions.dialog_text: Stay down and stay quiet. We’ll get through this together.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer, but moving now would be too dangerous. I need to stay hidden and keep everyone around me calm.

memories.description: Decided to walk to the hallway to check the student council bulletin board for any updates or announcements.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in the classroom to avoid increasing the danger by moving.
Decided to stay hidden in the hallway to avoid drawing attention, as the shooter is still in the building.
The shooter is moving closer, but decided to remain hidden in the hallway to avoid drawing attention and to keep everyone calm.
